## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update only
- [ ] CI / build / chore (no runtime impact)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] All affected test suites pass locally (`dotnet test tests/<suite>`)
- [ ] If this changes an MCP tool's behavior, I have updated [`README.md`](../blob/main/README.md) and [`HelpTools.cs`](../blob/main/src/CortexPlexus.App/Mcp/Tools/HelpTools.cs)
- [ ] If this changes performance characteristics, I have added a "Round NN" entry to [`docs/BENCHMARK.md`](../blob/main/docs/BENCHMARK.md)
- [ ] I have respected the module dependency rules (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
